name: narrow crawlway
hints: A narrow crawlway connecting the smuggler's hold to the ship's hold.
EAST goes to the ship's hold, WEST returns to the smuggler's hold (treasure room).
Simple connector passage. EAST leads to the ship's hold (room 21) with items. WEST returns to the smuggler's hold/treasure room (room 13).
notes: Narrow crawlway connecting the smuggler's hold/treasure room (room 13, west) to the ship's hold (room 21, east). Simple passage with no items or puzzles.
